campaign.name: ForgeTDM product-readiness acceptance
campaign.authorizedBy: Codex test coordinator, delegated by the product owner
campaign.notes: The product owner delegated story execution approval to the Codex test coordinator on 2026-07-19. Approval covers only ready-queue stories executed against local, non-production ForgeTDM fixtures. A separate explicit approval is required for every prohibited scope. Execution approval is not final acceptance; every green claim still requires independent evidence review.

conditions: Use synthetic test identities and artifacts only.
Do not contact external systems or paid services.
Do not test against production or customer data.
Retain sanitized evidence and independently review every green claim.
Use synthetic ALPHA/BETA identities and artifacts only.
Do not contact external systems or paid services.
Do not test against production or customer data.
Retain sanitized evidence and independently review every green claim.
LEGAL-001 and LEGAL-002 remain deferred to a separate qualified legal review.
Use a namespaced disposable PostgreSQL discovery fixture only.
Do not contact external systems or paid services.
Do not test against production or customer data.
Retain sanitized evidence and independently review every green claim.
Do not contact external systems or paid services.
Execute every catalog function and retain a compact result summary.
Use synthetic boundary values and disposable local database objects only.
Do not contact external systems or paid services.
Prove null, empty, Unicode, maximum-length, and JDBC datatype-fit behavior before marking green.
